rationale_en: A budget amendment revises one year's spending within a large economy, a routine and marginal force expected to leave no visible mark on GDP.
This 1933 credit institution was tiny in scale and predates by decades the modern series this chart tracks, so no expected effect on the aggregate credit-to-GDP ratio.
The bank was created specifically to extend agricultural credit, a real but partial channel alongside other early institutions serving the sector.
A single company's share-ownership court ruling is too small an event to expect any visible effect on aggregate listed-company counts or market capitalization.
The bylaw channels bank credit toward production, a real but marginal instrument among many similar credit-easing measures.
Easing production financing is one of many small inputs to industrial value added, with no expected visible effect on the aggregate share.
A narrow credit facility limited to technical and engineering export projects is a real but small channel into overall service exports.
This directive authorizes a specific bond instrument, a real but partial contributor to overall government liabilities and net debt.
One state low-cost housing sale program is negligible against the national housing-stock and tenure trends spanning decades.
A narrow, targeted job-credit facility for war migrants is too small to expect any visible effect on the national unemployment rate.
The Justice Shares program moved a large volume of state assets to households, a major but not sole force shaping top wealth concentration.
The program targeted low-income deciles directly, but the Gini index is shaped by many other forces, so only a partial effect is expected.
Justice Shares injected a real, sizable block of state-enterprise equity into listed intermediary companies, a material but partial contributor to market capitalization and listing counts.
Drought compensation and credit support are reactive, partial measures against crop yields that remain dominated by weather.
A narrow excise-tax revision on one product category is too small to move aggregate taxes on goods and services.
A car-tax change has only a marginal, indirect demand effect on domestic vehicle production.
This law reorganized the Ministry of Agriculture's mandate, a foundational but administrative structuring whose effect on any single agricultural indicator is diffuse rather than direct.
Transferring state agricultural and livestock facilities to private buyers is a real but partial piece of the broader post-revolutionary sectoral reorganization.
A narrow wheat-import and re-export procedural scheme has a real but limited channel into Iran's wheat trade volumes.
A bilateral trade agreement with a minor trading partner is too small to move aggregate merchandise trade.
The customs exemption lowered capital costs for power and water equipment, a real but partial contributor among the many drivers of energy investment.
As Iran's earliest modern annual budget, this law directly defines the founding Expense, Revenue, and Budget Totals series, though its link to aggregate GDP is comparatively indirect and small.
This is the direct legal act that nationalized Iran's forests, structurally redefining the ownership base that these two series measure.
Forest nationalization was one sectoral piece of the broader White Revolution reform package, and forestry is a small share of GDP and agricultural value added.
This is a narrow administrative finalization of land-reform status for one land category, individually too small to expect a visible GDP effect.
The regulation directly settled ownership of specific plots, a real but partial contributor to land allocation and wheat cultivation.
A narrow bilateral double-taxation treaty affects only cross-border investors, a negligible channel to aggregate tax revenue.
Setting a ceiling on Central Bank participation-bond issuance is a direct monetary lever, but one of several tools shaping money supply.
This amendment restructured a land-reform collective-farming vehicle, a real but partial institutional effect on agricultural output and land use.
A narrow amendment to a rangeland support fund is too small to expect a visible effect on livestock production.
A bilateral trade-cooperation framework with a minor partner is too small to move aggregate merchandise trade.
This companion sale/lease authorization for state agricultural and livestock assets is a real but partial piece of the broader post-revolutionary reorganization.
A bilateral cooperation and mutual-assistance agreement is one of many minor instruments touching trade, with negligible expected effect on aggregate trade.
This bylaw eases credit access for manufacturers, a real but partial measure among several similar instruments in the same legislative package.
A single, specific bond tranche financing one year's budget is negligible against aggregate government debt and budget totals.
Another credit and finance mechanism from the same production-competitiveness package is a real but partial contributor to industrial credit conditions.
This industrial-support bylaw is part of the same legislative package as its companions, a real but partial effect on industry and new business formation.
This amendment directly governs the cash-transfer calculation at the core of the subsidy reform, the documented driver of the 2010-11 CPI jump and transfer-spending surge.
This mechanism is Iran's largest cash social-transfer program, a real but partial force among the many factors shaping measured poverty and inequality.
This is a brand-new, small-scale investment vehicle established in 2025, too recent and marginal to have moved aggregate market capitalization.
This law was purpose-built to channel household savings into bank deposits during exactly the period this chart covers, a real but partial force among broader deposit growth.
As a savings-mobilization law rather than a housing-construction or supply instrument, it has no expected channel to the national housing-unit stock.
Raising a guarantee ceiling enabled more foreign-credit borrowing, a real but partial contributor to public guaranteed external debt.

This law created the executive ministry for Iran's entire land-reform and rural-cooperation program, a major but administrative and institutional vehicle rather than a direct redistribution instrument.
As an administrative ministry-creation act, its effect on GDP runs only indirectly through the land-reform policies it later administered.
Land redistribution was intended to reduce concentration, but this ministry-creation act is administrative and only one of several forces shaping the Gini index.
The ministry administered a gradual shift in rural labor relations away from tenancy, a real but indirect effect on agriculture's employment share.
This customs exemption for licensed industrial inputs is a real but partial effect on customs revenue and imports, limited to a narrow eligible group.
Replacing municipal tolls with a nationwide customs surcharge was a structural but moderate-scale change to the import-duty base.
This law tied a specific bond-repayment program's share sales to the exchange, a real but narrow contributor to listed-company market activity.
This is a transitional measure preserving existing loans during bank nationalization, not an expansionary credit instrument.
Drought-relief credit and rescheduling are reactive, partial support measures against crop yields dominated by weather.
A narrow, targeted credit-line expansion for drought-affected farmers is too small to expect a visible effect on aggregate private-sector credit to GDP.
This amendment directly revises the legal mechanism that sets the government's guaranteed wheat procurement price, a continuing and near-definitional price-support instrument for this series.
The same guaranteed-purchase framework also covers other cereals, a real but less central channel than for wheat itself.
This is an internal fee schedule confined to free trade zones, negligible against national customs duties and merchandise imports.
This is a procedural rule for assessing inheritance tax, a small, administrative sliver of income and capital-gains tax revenue.
A narrow land-pricing technicality for one sector is negligible against the broad business and investment climate category.
This is a technical fix to a share-allocation gap, negligible against aggregate listed-company market activity.
This is an administrative title-registration procedure carried out decades after the original land reform, procedural rather than economically transformative.
A narrow, earmarked subsidized-loan pool from one budget note is negligible against annual budget totals.
This PPP financing mechanism for unfinished infrastructure is a real but partial contributor to gross fixed capital formation.
This is an administrative restructuring of repayment terms on already-disbursed loans, not a new expansion of credit.
This is a market-conduct and disclosure rule for listed issuers, procedural and not expected to move market size or valuation.
This is the enacted annual national budget, the primary legal instrument that directly fixes and defines every government-finance series for that year.
This budget law fixed that year's government consumption spending directly, though its link to aggregate GDP is comparatively small and indirect.
This decree nationalized land in one specific irrigation catchment area, a real but geographically narrow effect on the broader agriculture and rural development category.
This law authorized specific hydro dam infrastructure, a real but partial contributor to the national hydroelectric generation share.
This is one of several non-consortium oil contracts of the era, a real but partial contributor to oil output and rents.
A single joint-venture oil contract is one of dozens driving the era's oil boom, individually too small to expect a visible GDP effect.
This law established the regulator and reinsurer that created the entire institutional and regulatory foundation of Iran's modern insurance industry.
This dedicated agricultural credit bank is a real but partial channel, one of several institutions serving the sector.
A mid-year supplementary appropriation directly adds to that year's fiscal totals, though smaller in scale than a full annual budget.
This is an operational arrangement for supplying power and fuel to industry, real but administrative and partial in its effect on industrial output.
A national credit-scoring system shapes lending decisions gradually, a real but diffuse channel to aggregate credit and financial-access measures.
This is a narrow eligibility-verification directive for one small professional group within the broader Justice Shares program, negligible on its own.
These annual banking-network directives set lending priorities and rate guidance, a real but administrative-regulatory channel into that year's monetary conditions.
This bylaw governs the National Development Fund's internal operating procedures rather than the inflow rules that actually determine its scale.
This bylaw operated as the licensing and procedural framework governing Iran's entire foreign-trade regime through a key period, a major but implementing-level instrument.
A duty change on one product category is too narrow to move an average tariff rate across all products or aggregate mobile-subscription growth.
This bylaw provides a regulatory channel shaping farm-size consolidation, a real but gradual and partial effect on land productivity.
This subsidized youth housing and marriage loan fund is one program among a broader housing and social-protection landscape.
This is Iran's principal legal instrument targeting energy intensity and efficiency, directly aimed at exactly the energy-per-GDP measures this chart tracks.
A narrow bilateral export-credit facility for one small trade corridor is negligible against aggregate exports.
This is a narrow technical valuation rule within the broader privatization program, negligible on its own.
This is the enacted wartime annual budget, the primary instrument directly fixing government revenue and expenditure ceilings for that year.
This budget shaped that year's wartime government consumption spending directly, though its link to aggregate GDP is comparatively small and indirect.
Deficit financing through central-bank credit is a recognized but indirect channel, one of several wartime inflation drivers.
This is the enacted annual national budget, directly fixing and defining that year's government-finance totals.
This budget law fixed that year's reconstruction-era government consumption spending directly, though its link to aggregate GDP is comparatively small and indirect.
Budget deficits are a recognized but indirect contributor among the broader post-war inflationary dynamics of the mid-1990s.
A narrow licensed-crop regime for one minor commodity is negligible against broad agricultural production.
This law extended land reform to religiously endowed land, a real but partial piece of the broader land-tenure restructuring.
This is a narrow extension of land reform to one specific land category, individually too small to expect a visible GDP effect.
This is a direct legal amendment to the very tobacco-monopoly statute this chart tracks across its full span.
Monopoly revenue functioned as a separate quasi-fiscal channel historically, only an indirect and negligible link to aggregate tax revenue.
This mid-year supplement directly adjusts that year's budget totals, real but smaller in scale than the full annual budget law.
This state export-promotion institution is a real but gradual and partial contributor to export performance.
This supplementary budget act directly adjusts that year's government revenue and expenditure.
This is the enacted annual national budget, the primary legal instrument directly fixing government revenue and expenditure for that year.
